description_long: This is a rounded ceramic teapot with a bulbous body, a gently curved spout, and a large loop handle. The exterior is decorated with a striking geometric pattern of concentric blue and white circles interspersed with vertical teal leaf motifs, all set against a white background. The spout and handle are both painted in a deep blue with the same circular motifs, creating a cohesive and vibrant look. The teapot features a matching lid with a small knob, also adorned with the blue and white circular pattern. The surface appears slightly matte with a hand-painted, artisanal finish, and the object exudes a traditional, handcrafted aesthetic. This teapot would be a visually appealing and functional addition to any kitchen or dining setting.
description: A rounded, hand-painted ceramic teapot with blue and white geometric patterns, a curved spout, and a loop handle. The lid and body feature matching decorative motifs for a cohesive, artisanal look.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from the side, showcasing the full length of the curved spout and the large loop handle, with the decorative patterns clearly visible.
description_view_1: The teapot is viewed from the front, directly facing the spout, highlighting the circular opening and the symmetry of the pattern around the spout.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the handle prominently, with the spout receding, and the decorative motifs wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: The back view centers the handle, showing the rear curvature of the teapot and the continuous pattern, with the spout mostly hidden.
attribute_spout_orientation: Curved spout angled slightly upward, positioned at the front of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: Large, rounded loop handle attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, moderately thick and ergonomically shaped.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a small central knob, fits snugly on top.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Geometric circular motifs in blue and white with teal leaf-like vertical accents, covering the body, spout, handle, and lid.
